title: Player Scaler
description: Lets you adjust the size of players in meters
body:
## Ever wanted to play Minecraft with your and other players real height?
No? Well now you can anyway.


### !!WARNING!!
Some anticheats may detect and ban you if change your own scale, this shouldn't apply for size changes of other players.

~~_**In the future the mod will have an option to disable the Camera Height change that is responsible for bans**_~~
Since Version 1.3.1 its now possible to disable this feature

### Usage:

```
/scale <height in meters e.g. 1.75> [player name]
```
#### For Versions >= 1.3.1
Enables or Disables the EyeHeight change Feature
```
/changeEyeHeight <true|false>
```
